data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/gha-scanner.md` exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/gha-scanner.md
- [ ] `plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md` contains a Step 0 GitHub Actions Pre-Scan section before the open-bug-count pre-check
  Verify: grep -q 'Step 0' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md
- [ ] Step 0 reads `debug.gha_workflows` from dso-config.conf; absent/empty logs 'GHA scan skipped: no workflows configured'
  Verify: grep -q 'gha_workflows' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md
- [ ] Step 0 performs pre-flight probe (per_page=1); on tool-not-found emits 'GHA scan unavailable: workflow run tools not registered'
  Verify: grep -q 'GHA scan unavailable' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/gha-scanner.md
- [ ] Sub-agent returns compact summary with fields: workflows_checked, tickets_created, failures_already_tracked
  Verify: grep -q 'workflows_checked' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/gha-scanner.md
- [ ] Step 0 uses tag-based dedup: gha:<workflow-file-name>
  Verify: grep -q 'gha:' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md && grep -q 'gha:' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/prompts/gha-scanner.md
- [ ] `debug.gha_scan_enabled` config key documented in .claude/dso-config.conf (default true, skips Step 0 when false)
  Verify: grep -q 'gha_scan_enabled' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] `debug.gha_workflows` config key documented in .claude/dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'gha_workflows' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Structural boundary test exists: verifies required sections present in gha-scanner.md (pre-flight probe, tag dedup, compact summary schema)
  Verify: grep -rq 'gha.scanner\|gha_scanner' tests/
